method_en: Five sequential layers: (L1) money map + (L2) indicator dictionary are a curated KB; (L3) live flow diagnosis is pure-quant from yfinance + FRED (keyless fredgraph.csv) + defillama; (L4) retail-vs-institution split + AI-market mapping and (L5) scenarios/triggers/falsification are synthesized by Claude on each refresh (rules fallback if no API key). Seed values let the dashboard render offline.
method_zh: 五層循序：(L1)資金地圖 +(L2)指標字典為策展知識庫；(L3)即時流向診斷純量化,取自 yfinance + FRED(免 key 的 fredgraph.csv)+ defillama;(L4)散戶vs機構拆解 + AI 市場映射、(L5)情境/觸發/證偽,每次刷新由 Claude 綜合(無 API key 時走規則 fallback)。種子值讓儀表板可離線渲染。

reservoirs.role_zh: 場邊乾火藥;風險資產的邊際燃料。

indicators.rising_zh: 流動性注入

財政部從市場抽走現金
貨幣成長支撐風險

reservoirs.role_en: Gravity for all risk assets; rates set the discount rate.

無風險利率上升

reservoirs.role_zh: 避險與抗法幣對沖;與實質利率反向。

加密乾火藥進場

廣度 — 普遍參與

reservoirs.role_zh: AI 論點定價之處;集中度與 capex 在此。

indicators.rising_zh: AI 基礎設施需求買盤

reservoirs.role_en: Strong USD drains global liquidity, pressures risk & gold.
reservoirs.role_zh: 美元走強抽乾全球流動性,壓制風險資產與黃金。

indicators.rising_zh: 美元走強抽乾全球流動性

retail_vs_institution.summary_en: Retail appetite 1.4 outruns institution 0.8, a 0.6 divergence — hot but not yet extreme (no formal warning). This is early topping-type behavior: small caps (IWM +3.82%) and equal-weight (RSP +2.4%) rip while the cap-weighted S&P (-1.54%) and QQQ (-2.26%) sag, signaling retail chasing broadening rotation. But the confirmation of risk-appetite exhaustion is missing — BTC -4.81% and stablecoin supply -2.61% show crypto risk money leaving, not blowing off. VIX only 0.54 and HY OAS +0.03 stay calm. Net liquidity slipping -2.38% with TGA +17.59% draining cash is the quiet institutional tell.
retail_vs_institution.summary_zh: 散戶情緒1.4高於機構0.8，背離0.6——偏熱但未極端（無正式警示）。呈早期見頂特徵：小型股IWM +3.82%、等權RSP +2.4%狂飆，而市值加權標普-1.54%、QQQ-2.26%走弱，顯示散戶追逐輪動擴散。但風險胃納見頂的確認缺失——比特幣-4.81%、穩定幣供給-2.61%顯示加密資金流出而非狂熱。VIX僅+0.54、高收益利差+0.03仍平靜。淨流動性回落-2.38%、TGA+17.59%抽走現金，是機構悄然收手的訊號。

ai_mapping.summary_en: AI leadership stays intact: SOXX +4.91% vs SPX gives AI_rel +6.45, and semis are the standout risk_on reservoir while QQQ (-2.26) lags — leadership is narrowing into chips, not broad tech. Breadth +3.94 (RSP−SPX) confirms participation is rotating outward, supportive short-term. Yet the liquidity tide is ebbing: net liquidity -2.38% and DXY +2.11% tighten conditions, while stablecoin -2.61% and BTC -4.81% show speculative crypto liquidity retreating from the AI risk complex. Continuation signal 63.5 is Supportive but not robust. Flows support AI grinding higher on rotation, but the fuel (liquidity + crypto risk appetite) is thinning — a warning underneath the strength.
ai_mapping.summary_zh: AI領導地位完好：SOXX +4.91%對標普，AI相對+6.45，半導體是突出的risk_on水池，而QQQ-2.26落後——領導收窄至晶片而非廣泛科技。廣度+3.94（RSP−SPX）確認參與向外輪動，短期偏多。但流動性潮水退去：淨流動性-2.38%、美元+2.11%收緊環境，穩定幣-2.61%、比特幣-4.81%顯示投機性加密流動性撤離AI風險群組。延續訊號63.5為支持但不強健。流量支持AI靠輪動緩升，但燃料（流動性+加密胃納）漸薄——強勢底下暗藏警訊。

thesis.direction_en: Mixed, leaning cautiously constructive on AI/semis but late-cycle
thesis.direction_zh: 中性偏多AI/半導體，但屬週期後段

leading_signals.en: Net liquidity trajectory (WALCL−RRP−TGA): -2.38% 1m; a second monthly contraction flips the tide against AI.
leading_signals.zh: 淨流動性軌跡（WALCL−RRP−TGA）：月-2.38%；再連續一月收縮將令潮水轉向不利AI。

leading_signals.en: Stablecoin supply (USDT+USDC): -2.61% — falling dry powder for speculative/AI risk; watch for continued drain.
leading_signals.zh: 穩定幣供給：-2.61%——投機/AI風險的乾火藥減少；留意持續流失。

leading_signals.en: SOXX−SPX relative (AI_rel 6.45): a roll-over below zero precedes index-level AI de-rating.
leading_signals.zh: SOXX−SPX相對（AI相對6.45）：跌破零的轉向早於指數層面AI估值下修。

leading_signals.en: HY OAS (now calm, +0.03): a >50bp widening is the credit canary before equity break.
leading_signals.zh: 高收益利差（現平靜+0.03）：擴大逾50bp是股市破裂前的信用先行訊號。

leading_signals.en: Retail-vs-institution divergence (0.6): a push above ~1.0 with BTC/ARKK re-surging marks blow-off whistle.
leading_signals.zh: 散戶對機構背離（0.6）：升破約1.0且BTC/ARKK重新飆升即為狂熱吹哨。

scenarios.trigger_en: RSP−SPX breadth stays ≥+3, IWM holds gains, SOXX_rel >0 while QQQ lags; HY OAS <3.5%.
scenarios.trigger_zh: RSP−SPX廣度維持≥+3，IWM守住漲幅，SOXX相對>0而QQQ落後；高收益利差<3.5%。

scenarios.trigger_en: Net liquidity re-accelerates (RRP drain funds it), breadth ≥0, stablecoin supply turns positive.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 淨流動性重新加速（RRP釋放資金支撐），廣度≥0，穩定幣供給轉正。

scenarios.name_en: Liquidity ebb → AI corrects, index softer
scenarios.name_zh: 流動性退潮→AI回調，指數走軟
scenarios.trigger_en: Net liquidity -2% again + DXY >+3% + SOXX_rel rolls below 0; stablecoin keeps draining.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 淨流動性再-2%＋美元>+3%＋SOXX相對跌破0；穩定幣持續流失。

scenarios.trigger_en: HY OAS widening >50bp + VIX >22 + net liquidity contracting.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 高收益利差擴大>50bp＋VIX>22＋淨流動性收縮。

falsification.en: SOXX−SPX relative rolls decisively below 0 for 2+ weeks while QQQ also breaks — AI leadership thesis dead.
falsification.zh: SOXX−SPX相對持續2週以上明確跌破0且QQQ同破——AI領導論點失效。

falsification.en: HY OAS widens >50bp with VIX >22 — calm-but-turning becomes credit break, flip to defensive.
falsification.zh: 高收益利差擴大>50bp且VIX>22——平靜轉裂成信用破裂，轉守勢。

falsification.en: Net liquidity posts a second consecutive monthly contraction while breadth turns negative — no fuel for continuation.
falsification.zh: 淨流動性連續第二月收縮且廣度轉負——延續缺乏燃料。

early_warning.en: Stablecoin supply (USDT+USDC) — flows move first as speculative dry powder.
early_warning.zh: 穩定幣供給——作為投機乾火藥最先變動。
高收益利差——信用先行指標。
散戶對機構背離＋BTC/ARKK——狂熱吹哨。

early_warning.en: DXY level — dollar tightening drag on risk.
early_warning.zh: 美元指數水平——美元收緊對風險的拖累。

channels.trigger_zh: 風險偏好上升 / 降息
貨幣基金殖利率升 / 恐慌
實質利率下降 / 貶值疑慮
AI 論點轉強 / capex 加速

channels.trigger_en: Rotation out of AI / breadth broadens
channels.trigger_zh: 資金輪出 AI / 廣度擴散
全球 risk-off / 美元避險

tap.name_zh: 全市場流動性(主水龍頭)
tap.desc_en: Net liquidity = Fed balance sheet − reverse repo − Treasury General Account. The tide that lifts or sinks every reservoir at once.
tap.desc_zh: 淨流動性 = Fed 資產負債表 − 逆回購 − 財政部帳戶(TGA)。同時抬升或下沉所有蓄水池的潮汐。

blind_spots_en: No direct institutional positioning (CFTC COT, BofA FMS cash, 13F) in the free layer — inferred from price/credit/vol proxies.
Retail behavior (0DTE options, AAII, margin debt) is proxied by BTC/ARKK/IWM, not measured directly.
Fund-flow (ETF creations/redemptions) not yet wired — would sharpen the reservoir-level read.
blind_spots_zh: 免費層沒有機構部位直接數據(CFTC COT、BofA FMS 現金、13F)——以價格/信用/波動代理推斷。
散戶行為(0DTE 選擇權、AAII、margin debt)以 BTC/ARKK/IWM 代理,非直接量測。
ETF 申購/贖回的資金流尚未接入——接上後可銳化蓄水池層的判讀。
